AboutMe.title: About Me
AboutMe.description: I am a passionate software developer with 5+ years of experience in building scalable web applications and microservice-based systems using modern technologies. I enjoy learning new programming languages and frameworks, and I am always looking for opportunities to improve my skills and contribute to exciting projects.
AboutMe.name: Dmytro Kotykhin

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.description: Here are some of the technologies and tools I am proficient in:

results: Led development of core features for a high-traffic marketplace platform SkinSwap
Designed and implemented real-time trading flows using WebSockets
Integrated 2 external payment providers, enabling new transaction channels
Implemented localized Chinese marketplace version with adapted payment flows
Contributed to microservice architecture for marketplace services
Delivered 100+ production features across trading, payments, and gamification systems
Fully implemented quiz flow for Studybooster educational project
Delivered 2 production-ready commercial platforms
Developed 20+ features for internal CRM system used by 100+ employees
Implemented gRPC communication between microservices
Optimized frontend performance, reducing load times by 30%
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features
Maintained and improved existing codebase, ensuring high code quality and reliability
Delivered 10+ production web applications
Designed GraphQL APIs using Apollo Server and integrated them with frontend applications
Integrated Stripe payment processing into e-commerce platforms, enabling secure transactions
Deployed and maintained applications on AWS infrastructure, utilizing services such as EC2, S3, and RDS
Developed and maintained Salesforce applications using Apex, Visualforce, and Lightning components
Implemented custom Salesforce Lightning components using Aura and LWC frameworks
Delivered 5 commercial projects using JavaScript and Tilda platform
Implemented custom JavaScript solutions to enhance functionality and user experience of Tilda-based websites

education.title: My Education
education.name: National University of Radio Electronics, Kharkiv, Ukraine.

hobbies.title: My Hobbies
hobbies.hobby1: Learned programming ATmega8 and STM32 microcontrollers. I also have experience with Arduino and Raspberry Pi, which I used for various projects, including home automation and robotics.
hobbies.hobby2: Interested in radio electronics and have built several amateur radio projects.
hobbies.hobby3: In my free time, I enjoy riding my bike. I also have a passion for photography and love capturing moments from my travels around the world.
